focusBorder.$description: Overall border color for focused elements. This color is only used if not overridden by a component

foreground.$description: Overall foreground color. This color is only used if not overridden by a component

descriptionForeground.$description: Foreground color for description text providing additional information

errorForeground.$description: Overall foreground color for error messages

foreground.$description: The default color for icons in the workbench

background.$description: Background color of text selections in the workbench for input fields or text areas

shadow.$description: Shadow color of widgets such as Find/Replace inside the editor

border.$description: Border color of widgets such as Find/Replace inside the editor

disabledForeground.$description: Overall foreground for disabled elements. This color is only used if not overridden by a component

hoverBackground.$description: Toolbar background when hovering over actions using the mouse

activeBackground.$description: Toolbar background when holding the mouse over actions
